patterns.title: Multiple Primary CTAs On Same Plane
patterns.description: Two or more actions compete as the obvious next step in the same region.

patterns.title: Destructive Action Styled As Default Primary
patterns.description: Dangerous actions are visually equivalent to routine forward actions without safeguard context.

patterns.title: Missing State Definitions
patterns.description: A data-dependent or async surface omits loading, empty, or error behavior.

patterns.title: Visual Noise Stack
patterns.description: Shadows, borders, gradients, pills, badges, and accent colors all compete at once.

patterns.title: Marketing Shell For Operational Workflows
patterns.description: Hero sections, oversized headlines, and excessive whitespace displace working content.

patterns.title: Wrong Register Surface
patterns.description: A screen uses brand, product, operations, or music-surface styling that conflicts with the user's actual task and context.

patterns.title: Decorative Accent Breakout
patterns.description: Badges, buttons, section fills, or highlights dominate the composition without carrying semantic, navigational, or subject-specific meaning.

patterns.title: False Spaciousness
patterns.description: Large empty margins and sparse content blocks simulate polish while degrading task efficiency, scanability, or information comparison.
